---
title: "Andreas Bogossian"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---

## About

This blog is a medium for public learning. My goal is to write about concepts that I don't understand and create structured explanations.

By writing about things I don't understand I aim to achieve two things: the first benefit is that I understand the concept when I'm able to finish a post about it. The second benefit is that the blog functions as a portfolio to showcase concepts that I'm working with.

On this blog you can expect to see posts about mathematics, machine learning and computer science. I've always been interested in math and computer science, so machine learning felt like a natural intersection of the two topics.
